chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. S-461 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge Hearing of Case 1. For hearing of main case 16.2.2026 Mr. Abdul Haseeb advocate for the petitioner Mr. Hashmatullah Aleem advocate for the respondent --------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition as the parties have settled their dispute outside the court. Order accordingly JUDGE Shafi
